category_sources: source_facts.description says BibTeX to HTML converter; current_curation.category_path lists productivity.
display_name_sources: Official project homepage and manual use the name BibTeX2HTML; source_facts.name is bibtex2html.
docs_sources: Official homepage links on-line documentation and PDF; official manual is hosted under the project doc directory.
repo_sources: Official project distribution moved to the backtracking/bibtex2html GitHub repository, which contains the project README, source files, releases, and manual source.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says BibTeX to HTML converter; official manual describes command-line tools bibtex2html, bib2bib, and aux2bib.
